backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing OTP generation/verification, user profiles, customer management, and admin-gated approval workflows using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature request to revert the entire application to Version 9, listing affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON text file containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the G&S Medical React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all customer and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders a shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a button to return to the homepage, used when a non-admin tries to access restricted areas.
frontend/src/components/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin shell layout with a sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Products, Orders, Refunds), auth guard that redirects unauthenticated users to /admin/login, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, and customer care phone numbers for G&S Medical.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, cart icon with item count badge, and a phone number display.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a shared Header, Footer, and a flex-column structure using TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/OrderDetailsModa: Modal dialog displaying full order details (customer info, items, totals) and allowing admins to update the order status via a dropdown.
frontend/src/components/OrderTimelineSte: Vertical timeline stepper component that visually represents order progress steps with icons, colors, and active/completed/cancelled states.
frontend/src/components/PriceFlip.tsx: Wrapper component that applies a 3D flip-in CSS animation to price displays, supporting viewport-triggered and key-change-triggered replays with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Dialog form for creating or editing a product, with fields for name, description, price, category, medicine type, stock, availability, prescription requirement, and image upload.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Stub component that renders nothing; placeholder for a profile setup modal with no Internet Identity flow.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonProductC: Loading skeleton placeholder for a product card, using shimmer animations to indicate content is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A React component that renders a colored pill badge for order, payment, or refund statuses using Tailwind CSS color classes.
A React component that displays a horizontal progress bar with step count and percentage label based on currentStep and totalSteps props.
frontend/src/components/WaveUnderline.ts: A React component that wraps a heading element with an animated SVG wavy emerald underline that draws in via stroke-dashoffset when the element enters the viewport, respecting prefers-reduced-motion.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state management, exposing add, remove, update quantity, and clear operations along with a total item count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that manages admin authentication state by calling actor login/logout methods and persisting session status in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity persistence, and delegation validity.
frontend/src/hooks/useOdometerCounter.ts: A hook that animates a numeric value as an odometer by staggering per-digit transitions, with reduced-motion support and an optional auto-trigger.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products, categories, orders, refunds, and inquiries, as well as mutations for placing orders and adding/updating products via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSellerAuth.ts: Custom React hook managing seller authentication state, including login/logout logic, session persistence via localStorage, and SHA-256 password hashing using the Web Crypto API.
frontend/src/hooks/useTextScramble.ts: Custom React hook that animates text by scrambling characters for 400ms before progressively revealing the target string, with immediate resolution if the user prefers reduced motion.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for G&S Medical displaying the company mission, core values with icons, and founder profiles with contact information.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that fetches and displays summary stats (products, orders, revenue, refunds) and a table of the five most recent orders.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page with an email/password form that calls the useAdminAuth hook and redirects to the admin panel on successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminOrdersPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing, filtering, sorting, and updating the status of all customer orders in a table with a detail dialog.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProductsPage.tsx: Admin page for managing products with search, add, edit, and delete functionality using a table layout and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/AdminRefundsPage.tsx: Admin page for viewing and updating refund request statuses, with summary stats, search, and status filter.
frontend/src/pages/AdminSellersPage.tsx: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for an admin sellers management page.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, item removal, and an order summary with subtotal, delivery fee, and total.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page showing business contact info (phone, email, address, hours) and an inquiry submission form with toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLoginPage.tsx: Empty file with no content, likely a placeholder for the customer login page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for G&S Medical Store featuring a hero section, feature highlights (delivery, authenticity, etc.), and a featured products grid fetched via useGetProducts hook.
frontend/src/pages/NotFoundPage.tsx: Simple 404 error page displaying a 'Page Not Found' message with a button to navigate back to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Confirmation page shown after a successful order, displaying the order ID, next steps, and customer care contact numbers.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: UPI payment page that shows a QR code and UPI ID for payment, collects customer details and transaction reference, then submits the order via usePlaceOrder.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Product listing page with search, category filter, and prescription-only toggle, displaying available products with add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboardPage.t: Empty file; seller dashboard page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx: Empty file; seller login page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/SellerOrdersPage.tsx: Empty file; seller orders management page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/SellerProductsPage.ts: Empty file; seller products management page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/SellerProfilePage.tsx: Empty file; seller profile page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/pages/SellerRegisterPage.ts: Empty file; seller registration page with no implemented content.
frontend/src/utils/sortHelpers.ts: Empty file; intended for sort helper utilities with no implemented content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration mapping CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extending fonts and border radii, and registering animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall state of the G&S Medical online store project (version 45), including architectural notes, known issues, store details, and a list of all existing and planned features for the website, mobile app, and admin dashboard.
